scene_input.key_visual_action: Khubayb standing up after the second rakʿah, with his hands on his hips
scene_input.setting: A desert or a place of execution

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 186

characters.name: Khubayb ibn ʿAdiy
characters.appearance: tall build, upright posture, wearing a simple beige tunic and brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, one hand on his hip

schema_output.narrative_text: Khubayb completes his prayer, feeling at peace with Allah.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene desert landscape with vast sandy dunes stretching into the distance, a few isolated palm trees scattered here and there. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy terrain, with a warm golden glow in the background. A figure stands out in the foreground - the central figure seen entirely from behind: tall build, dignified upright posture, wearing a simple beige tunic and brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, one hand on his hip, one hand on his chest, indicating he has completed his prayer. The atmosphere is peaceful and serene, with a sense of calm and devotion. Medium shot from the side, slightly elevated to emphasize the peaceful setting. Warm beige, golden, and sandy color palette with the brown cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
